microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end pre-sales-style technical discovery** across 5+ enterprise partner integrations (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), surfacing compliance and resilience gaps and mapping them to Azure capabilities — driving **$14M+ in validated business impact**.

Built a **0→1 Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements and reusable workflow assets that reduced operational toil by 30% and gave enterprise stakeholders a scalable, auditable evaluation environment.

Served as **bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, navigating multi-stakeholder legal, security, and engineering sign-off across 14 cross-org executions under C-suite visibility.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by defining technical requirements, scoping integration dependencies, and communicating complex outcomes to non-technical audiences.

Deployed an **internal AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — establishing reusable playbooks adopted across the resilience org.

Translated enterprise compliance and recovery requirements into standardized demo-ready workflows, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining **45+ annual resilience drills** across regulated industries including financial services and sovereign cloud.
microsoft_2023: Led **technical discovery and adoption demos** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user interviews and tailored presentations that drove utilization across **14 enterprise service teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ structured discovery sessions** with Azure engineering stakeholders — surfacing critical workflow gaps and feeding prioritized insights back to the product team.

Improved retrieval accuracy and data integrity by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search platform**, enforcing metadata standards that cut lookup time by 83% and reduced compliance-related documentation errors.
microsoft_2022: Unlocked **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch timelines by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — building the business case and presenting to stakeholders across 140+ teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ enterprise service teams to surface 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, translating findings into a phased **automation roadmap** that mapped pain points directly to platform capabilities and prioritized highest-impact paths.

Engineered a **Power BI compliance dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of support resources.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit pilot transition**, mapping integration dependencies across 1,200+ stations and coordinating multi-stakeholder sign-off across IT, Operations, and Engineering — achieving **zero operational downtime**.

Facilitated Agile discovery and sprint ceremonies to prioritize a 40+ ticket backlog, resolving high-impact developer intake issues and establishing reusable **technical due diligence** standards for future platform evaluations.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, reducing deployment cycle time by 25% and creating a scalable integration model adopted for future rollouts.
pro_painters: Boosted job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly opportunities in a new CRM platform — owning the full sales cycle from scoping through close in a high-volume, multi-stakeholder environment.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profiles to align messaging with how buyers actually evaluate and purchase.

Delivered a **profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, presenting structured findings to leadership and informing updated pricing models — mirroring the voice-of-customer feedback loop critical to enterprise SE work.

tailoring_notes: 'Multi-stakeholder sales cycles' (JD term) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#1 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 to mirror Blee's complex legal/compliance/marketing deal motion.
'Technical discovery' (JD term) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#1, microsoft_2023 bullet#1, and amazon_robotics bullet#2 to directly echo Blee's core SE responsibility of leading discovery sessions.

'Reusable assets' and 'playbooks' (JD terms for the 0→1 SE function build) embedded in microsoft_ft bullet#5, amazon_robotics bullet#2, and pro_painters bullet#1 to show Cyrus has built scalable SE infrastructure before.

'Voice of customer' feedback loop (JD section header) reflected in pro_painters bullet#3 — framing profitability analysis as structured insight delivery back to decision-makers, paralleling the SE-to-Product feedback role at Blee.

'Regulated industries' and 'financial services / sovereign cloud' (JD domain terms) called out in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and bullet#3 to signal comfort in the compliance-heavy verticals Blee sells into.
